description: T1 issues always route to Claude by default; Codex is only permitted under explicit guardrails described in three-brain Rule 1
rationale: three-brain Rule 1: tier:T1 → executor = Claude by default, escalate_to_griff = true (plan + merge). Codex is permitted only when all five Rule 1 guardrails are met; this policy represents the default routing path.

description: Dangerous-class work (Runtime, Migration, Modeling, Data/Canonical) always routes to Claude — Codex is never authorized for these lane types
rationale: three-brain Rule 2 and LANE_CONCURRENCY_POLICY.md §10 ineligible work classes: Runtime, Migration, Modeling, and Data/Canonical lanes are Claude-only. Codex CLI is restricted to safe work classes (Governance, Hygiene, Verification, Delivery/UI). DELEGATION_POLICY.md: Codex lane is never authorized for Tier C work.
